title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Disha Publication

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Disha Publication
jsonLd.description:
Disha Publication invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Disha Publication:
Disha Publication is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication!
